function.name: readLocalPurchaseOrder
function.description: PROTOCOL ALPHA: Use this first to check 'PO_April20.csv' for customer orders whenever new stock arrives.

filePath.description: The name of the CSV file, usually 'PO_April20.csv'.

function.name: getProductAnalysis
function.description: Retrieves product weight, volume, and calculates real-time sales velocity from the database.

productId.description: The ID of the product, e.g., 'K15VC'.

function.name: findOptimalBin
function.description: Finds the best physical bin in the warehouse based on weight, volume, and sales velocity.

weight.description: The TOTAL weight of the incoming shipment.

volume.description: The TOTAL volume of the incoming shipment.

productId.description: The exact ID of the product being stored (e.g., 'KU50Y').

function.name: searchProductByDescription
function.description: Use this FIRST if the worker gives a product name (like 'ceiling fan' or 'bulb') instead of a product ID. It returns the exact Product ID.

keyword.description: A single keyword from the product description.

function.name: listWarehouseInventory
function.description: Lists EVERY product currently stored in the warehouse along with the bins they occupy. Use this when the worker asks for the full inventory (e.g. 'what do we have?', 'list everything', 'show inventory'). Takes no arguments.

function.name: findProductLocation
function.description: Use this when the worker asks WHERE a product is currently stored (e.g., 'where is K15VC?', 'location of ceiling fan'). Returns every bin holding that product. Do NOT use for the delivery workflow.

function.name: updateBinStatus
function.description: Use this to update the database AFTER a worker places items in a bin. It records the new status and the exact Product ID inside the bin.

productId.description: The exact ID of the product being stored (e.g., 'KU50Y').

function.name: reportAccident
function.description: Call this immediately when a worker reports an accident, blockage, spill, or broken equipment (like a forklift) in a specific area. It alerts the manager via Telegram and temporarily blocks the aisle in the routing system.

location.description: The location of the incident, e.g., 'Aisle 2', 'Loading Dock B'.

description.description: A brief summary of what happened, e.g., 'Forklift broke down', 'Oil spill'.

function.name: clearAisle
function.description: Call this when a worker or manager confirms that a previously blocked aisle or area is now safe and accessible. It unblocks all bins in the routing system and notifies the manager via Telegram.

location.description: The location to unblock, e.g., 'Aisle 2', 'Loading Dock B'.
